datasets.description: Two-year daily single series with stable trend and no seasonality.
datasets.name: trend_only_long

datasets.description: Daily single series with weekly and annual seasonality.
datasets.name: weekly_annual_seasonal

datasets.description: Sparse intermittent daily demand with slow drift.
datasets.name: intermittent_sparse

datasets.description: Single series with weekly seasonality and a mid-history level shift.
datasets.name: regime_shift

datasets.description: Multi-series pickup/dropoff lane demand panel with lane offsets and calendar effects.
datasets.name: panel_lanes_long

datasets.description: Panel demand with deterministic bursts, lane heterogeneity, and structured noise.
datasets.name: noisy_geotemporal_panel

protocol.leakage_rule: train timestamps are strictly before validation timestamps
